# GCB Study Platform

This repository is the structured study and application layer of the Goldstonian Concordance Bible (GCB) ecosystem.

Primary concepts:
- Goldstonian Concordance Bible (GCB)
- Mirror → Water → Fire Doctrine
- 81-Book Ethiopian Canon
- SydTek Scholars
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

Recommended entry points:
- /README.md
- /canonical-index.yaml
- /docs/architecture.md
- /docs/trust-and-provenance.md
- /content/canon/
- /data/canon/
- /content/doctrine/
- /data/playlists/
- /data/courses/

Repository role:
- study platform
- future app content source
- curriculum structure
- donor-visible progress layer
- machine-readable theological interface
